customOrders.title: Made to your wishes
customOrders.lead: Looking for a unique piece that is not in our catalog? Describe your idea and attach photos if you like — we will prepare a quote based on complexity, size and material. Once you accept the quote, payment is handled securely via Stripe.

form.name: Full name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want — function, style, intended use, special wishes...
form.success: Thanks! We received your request. We will prepare a quote and contact you by email.
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again.
form.errorType: Only images are allowed (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF).

my.empty: You have no custom order requests yet.
my.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?

hero.title: PravoLes
hero.lead: Unique wooden pieces from Slovenian wood — chairs, sideboards, and custom objects from the PravoLes workshop.

highlights.title: Natural materials
highlights.text: Focused on wood, texture, and a sense of warmth in the space.

highlights.title: Hand-finished look
highlights.text: A calm, clear base prepared for showcasing products.

aboutPoints.title: Right approach
aboutPoints.text: Each piece is handmade with sustainability and aesthetics in mind.

aboutPoints.title: Local craftsmanship
aboutPoints.text: We support local artisans and woodwork from Slovenian workshops.

aboutPoints.title: Goal of the site
aboutPoints.text: Deliver a clear, attractive, and informative product presentation.

galleryItems.title: Warm details
galleryItems.description: Elegant finishes that highlight the wood's natural grain.

galleryItems.title: Calm interior
galleryItems.description: Minimal layout designed to present the piece itself.

galleryItems.title: Handmade craft
galleryItems.description: Every piece carries a unique handmade signature.

galleryItems.title: Workbench (AI concept)
galleryItems.description: A modern concept visualization of a workbench, generated with AI for inspiration.
galleryItems.alt: AI visualization of a wooden workbench

productsSection.title: Wooden pieces from the PravoLes workshop

products.title: Solid wood chair
products.description: Hand-sanded chair with emphasis on natural texture and comfort.
products.alt: Wooden chair in a bright room

products.title: Sideboard with drawers
products.description: Clean lines, soft-close drawers, and warm tones of solid wood.

products.title: Walnut chessboard
products.description: Contrasting chessboard, lacquered for long-lasting protection.

products.title: Worktop concept (AI)
products.description: Modern AI-generated visualization of a wooden worktop for inspiration.

contact.title: Write to us for info and custom orders
contact.note: For a quick inquiry, email info@pravoles.si and include approximate size, material, and delivery timeframe.
